pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs to save the editable file to '/home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.eddx'.
Task description explicitly instructs to export the infographic as an image to '/home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.png'.
Task description explicitly requires the title 'Remote Work Impact 2024' and the key insight text 'Flexibility is the top driver of productivity.'.
Task description explicitly requires visualizing the survey data values 45% Increased, 35% No Change, and 20% Decreased.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax statistical infographic from scratch. Verified the expected output paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/remote_work_infographic.eddx and .png), the required textual elements ('Remote Work Impact 2024', 'Flexibility is the top driver'), and the required chart data values (45, 35, 20) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the verifier logic.
